reason: The way you always know how to make me laugh.
How you treat every animal like it is the most important thing in the world.
How you always make me feel at home.
Your thougtfulness and kindness comes effortlessly.
The way your eyes light up when you talk about something you love.
How you remember the little things that matter to me.
The fact that you make me want to be a better person every single day.
The way you love.
How you look after me when I'm not well.
The sound of your laugh is one of the bestest in the world.
How you stand up for who and what you love.
The way you make every room feel warmer just by being in it.
Your creativity, the way your mind works is unlike anything in the world.
How patient you are, even when you have every right not to be.
The way you always know when something is wrong, even when I say nothing.
How you give the best hugs, the kind that make everything feel better.
The way you care about things with your whole heart.
How you can make even the most boring day feel like an adventure.
The way you talk to animals like they completely understand you.
How strong you are, even when you do not feel it.
The way you make me feel seen.
The dimples on your cheeks when you smile.
The way you get lost in things you are passionate about.
How honest you are, even when it's hard to be.
How you  can never make anyone or anything feel small or unimportant.
How you stim when you are happy or excited.
How you light up around people and things that you love.
You persevere despite how hard life can be.
The way you always show up for me, no matter what.
How you make me feel like the luckiest person alive.
The way you handle hard things with so much grace than you give yourself credit for.
How your smile can completely lift my spirits in a heartbeat.
The way you love our children like they are your whole world.
How you always make time for the things that matter.
The way you get excited about simple pleasures like a tasty dinner, being cosy in bed, or doing the food shop.
How you have grown so much and have never stopped growing.
The way you make me feel safe in a way no one else has.
How you are so funny without even trying.
The way you reach to hold my hand when we are out and about.
How you never hold grudges — your capacity to forgive is something I truly admire.
The way you make even the hardest days feel manageable.
How you are curious about everything and always want to learn.
The way you put so much love and thought into the things you do for others.
How completely yourself you are — you never pretend to be anything else.
The way you appreciate the little gestures as much as the big ones.
How you make me laugh every single day without fail.
The way you take care of yourself and the people around you.
How deeply empathetic you are — you feel things so fully.
The way you never make me feel judged for being exactly who I am.
How you have this quiet strength that carries everyone around you.
The way your face looks when you are genuinely happy — it is everything.
How you always try your best, even when things are difficult.
The way you make our house feel like a proper home.
How you are endlessly thoughtful in ways most people would never even think of.
The way you stand up for what you believe in, quietly but firmly.
How you bring out a side of me that I did not even know was there.
The way you love autumn and all the cosy things that come with it.
How you are equally happy on a big night out or a quiet night in.
The way you take care of everyone around you without being asked.
How you are the first person I want to tell everything to.
The way you smell — like home, always like home.
How you have this ability to make people feel instantly comfortable around you.
The way you get protective over the people and things you love.
How you are so much braver than you think you are.
The way you find humour in the darkest moments and make everything lighter.
How you have shaped me into a better version of myself just by loving me.
The way you commit to things fully — your whole heart or nothing.
How you make even grocery shopping feel like something worth doing together.
The way you notice when people need something before they ask for it.
How you are the most genuine person I have ever known.
The way you get cosy and make a whole ritual out of it.
How you balance being tough and tender better than anyone I know.
The way you make me feel proud to be with you every single day.
How you have this warmth that draws people to you without you even realising.
The way you always find a reason to be grateful, even on hard days.
How you are endlessly patient with the people you love.
The way you take everything in your stride, even when it is not easy.
How you are the kind of person who makes other people's lives better just by being in them.
The way you never stop surprising me, even after all these years.
How you have the most wonderful, warm, generous soul.
The way you look in the morning — completely yourself and completely beautiful.
How you turn small ordinary moments into something I will remember forever.
The way you take pride in who you are and where you come from.
How you are the calm in every storm.
The way you always have time for the people who need you.
How you make even bad days end on a good note.
The way you carry yourself — with so much more confidence than you give yourself credit for.
How you love so unconditionally, without keeping score.
The way you make me feel like everything is going to be okay.
How you are the best thing that has ever happened to me, full stop.
The way you are always in my corner, no matter what.
How you make the future feel exciting just by being part of it.
The way you love deeply and without reservation.
How you are my best friend in every single sense of the word.
The way you make me feel chosen, every single day.
How you have stood by me through everything and never wavered.
The way you make even the most ordinary Tuesday feel like something special.
How you are endlessly, effortlessly, wonderfully you.
The way every single day with you is better than the one before.
How I fall more in love with you every single day and cannot imagine a single moment without you.
